title: Inconsistency in Classification Data Error
content: Run TCode BMCC to resolve inconsistency in classification data error. Transaction: BMCC.

title: Auto IBD Not Creating
content: Cause: Missing parameter in purchase order. Check the PO for missing mandatory parameters and complete them. Then retry the IBD creation. Transaction: ME22N, ME23N.

title: Add Users to RF Queue
content: Use LRFMD to add users to RF Queue: 1) Click on Change. 2) Select the User ID to change or click New Entries to add new users. 3) Tick status as Active. 4) Save. Use LPK1 / LPK2 / LPK3 to create, change, and display control cycles. Transaction: LRFMD, LPK1, LPK2, LPK3.

title: Shipment Error - Account Determination
content: To correct invoice error in shipment: Go to VF02 and update the AcctAssmtGrpMat field. This resolves account determination errors on shipment invoices. Transaction: VF02.

title: Shipment Error - Transat / HS Code
content: Update HS code and origin country at master data level to resolve Transit/Transat shipment errors. Refer to attached invoicing error PDF for country of origin field locations. Transaction: MM02.

title: New Variant Creation for VL10D - Orders Over 90 Days
content: Create a new variant in VL10D to pick orders over 90 days for STO OBD creation. Configure variant selection criteria to include delivery dates beyond 90 days. Transaction: VL10D.

title: Scrap Materials Using HUMO
content: Steps to scrap materials using HUMO: 1) Enter the list of HUs and execute. 2) Select pick for scrapping. 3) Check the reason code and the cost center before confirming. Transaction: HUMO.

title: Invoice Not Getting Created in OBD
content: To resolve invoice not creating in OBD: 1) Go to VF01. 2) Enter delivery number in the document column. 3) Click Save. The invoice (Tenn. invoice) will be generated. Transaction: VF01.

title: Cannot PGI OBD Due to Inspection Lot Open
content: PGI is blocked because there is an open inspection lot. Close or complete the quality inspection lot (usage decision) before attempting PGI. Check inspection lot status in QA32. Transaction: QA32, VL02N.

title: qRFC Queue Monitor - Clear Blocked Transfer Orders
content: Use SMQ2 to view the inbound queue of qRFC: 1) Select the TO number which is blocked or not cleared correctly. 2) Click on Display Selection. 3) Click on Activate Queue to release the blocked TO. Transaction: SMQ2.

title: Remove Minus Figures from PACK.BIN Storage Bin
content: Steps to fix minus stock in PACK.BIN: 1) Identify stock in PACK.BIN and the corresponding storage type where positive line exists. 2) Go to LT01 to manually create a Transfer Order. 3) In FROM section: enter Storage Type + Section + Bin (Positive side). 4) In TO section: enter Storage Type + Section + Bin (minus side). 5) Press Enter to validate — system auto-fills fields. 6) Press Enter again to post TO. 7) Refresh LS24 to confirm +/- figures are set off. Transaction: LT01, LS24.

title: IDOC and RFC Monitoring
content: Key transactions for IDOC and RFC monitoring: WE02 - Standard IDOC display. WE09 - IDOC monitor with filters and details. EDIDD - IDOC Data Record Table. EDID4 - IDOC Data Table (alternate). EDIDS - IDOC Status Record Table. SMQ1 - RFC Monitoring (outbound). SMQ2 - RFC Monitoring (inbound). SM58 - MII RFC connections and transactional RFC. Transaction: WE02, WE09, SMQ1, SMQ2, SM58.

title: Storage Unit Is Not a Handling Unit Error
content: Resolution for 'Storage unit is not a handling unit' error: 1) Go to HU02 and enter the SU number with the problem, press Enter. 2) Select the HU line and empty the existing HU by clicking the empty button. 3) Create a new HU by entering a packing material (BOX_OMEGA or ROLL_OMEGA). 4) Select the new HU line from top and the quantity line from bottom and pack it. 5) Check 'Ttl content' to confirm packing status. 6) Press Save — system automatically creates and confirms a TO. 7) Print the new HU label and paste it over the old one. Transaction: HU02.

title: Update Preferential Country of Origin
content: To update Preferential Country of Origin in report ZSIR_CONTR_CONS: Go to MM42 and update the relevant field. This will update the country of origin field in the report output. Transaction: MM42, ZSIR_CONTR_CONS.

title: Transfer Incorrectly Assigned Non-HU Stock to HU Stock
content: Use movement type 311 to transfer when non-HU managed stock is available for a HU managed material. This creates an IBD in the system. Using this IBD, pack the non-HU stock into HUs and GR the stock to the correct storage location. Transaction: MIGO (311), MB1B.

title: HU Fix - GR Reversal Stock Still Visible in LS24
content: Issue: HU having a GR reversal document but stock still visible in LS24. Fix: Check and fix HU in VEKP table — HU_LGORT field should change from value A to X. Reference ticket: 2024-2122153. Transaction: SE16 (VEKP), HUMO.

title: Create RF Connection for Zebra Devices
content: PR1 SAP connection: Hostname: 172.16.146.106 or pr1tns.calzedonia.com | User: lkusr | Password: lkusrlkusr. XR2 SAP connection: Server: pm3tns.calzedonia.com | User: xr2usr | Password: xr2usrxr2usr. Create the Auto Login profile in the Zebra device settings. Reference barcode setup profile for scanner configuration.

title: Delivery Creating Error While Returning to Supplier
content: Extend the customer linked with the supplier code to the following: Sales Organization - Raw Materials, Distribution Channel - TR (Transfers), Division - 00. Then retry the return delivery creation. Transaction: VD01/XD01.

title: VT70 ZB18 Error
content: Check whether any OBD attached to shipments does not have a ZB01 message type processed. If not, add ZB01 and create the IBDs. Verify in the output control for the delivery. Transaction: VT70, VL02N (output control).

title: QTY Difference Between LX02 and MD04
content: When stock in MMBE is assigned to a supplier but MRP areas are not created, quantities appear inconsistent between LX02 and MD04. Resolution: Create relevant MRP areas using transaction ZFPP_VENDOR_MRPA, then click Back and Save, then Generate. Reference ticket: 2025-2016358. Transaction: MMBE, LX02, MD04, ZFPP_VENDOR_MRPA.

title: Z Custom Transactions Reference List
content: Key custom Z transactions: ZFPP_WM_COWBHUWE, ZISR_ARTICOLI_ACQUIS, ZISR_CHG_DATE_INBD, ZISR_CONTR_CONS, ZISR_DATA_LOG_FI, ZISR_DATIBA_WM, ZISR_GET_IB_SHIPMENT, ZISR_HU_WEIGHT_LIST, ZISR_INFOREC_LIST, ZISR_INV_WM, ZISR_LX02_USER, ZISR_OUTPUT_CTRL, ZISR_PLANT_PACK_LIST, ZISR_PLANT_SHIP_ADV, ZISR_PO_SCHEDULE, ZISR_SKU_SHIPMDETAIL, ZISR_SPLIT_HU, ZISR_UPDATE_WM, ZISR_UPDATEWEIGHT_HU, ZISR_WM_RSTR, ZLM01, ZLM02, ZLM06, ZZ_SESSION_MANAGER, ZWM_SKU_WH, ZFMM_ART_DATA, ZMM46, ZISR_PLANT_SH_DETAIL, ZISR_PSA_LAYOUT, ZISR_ARTICOLI_DATIBA, ZISR_MIGO_MASS, ZISR_MIGO_ODA, ZMM_MIGO_MASS.

title: MIGO Subcontracting - Service Receipt Error
content: If there is an inbound error in subcontracting MIGO: Go to ME22N and ensure the Conf.Control field is Empty (blank). Then retry the MIGO service receipt posting. Transaction: MIGO, ME22N.

title: Unpack Pallet HU
content: Move the nested HU to pack.bin first, then use LM22 transaction to unpack the Pallet HU. Alternatively, empty the pallet HU and remove it. Transaction: LM22, HUMO.

title: HU Sticker Color per Brand
content: Approved HU sticker color mapping per brand: 1) Calzedonia - Pink. 2) Intimissimi - Light Blue. 3) IUMAN - Orange. 4) Tezenis - Red. 5) Falconeri - Yellow. 6) Atelier Eme / Antonio Marras / Golden Lady - Green. 7) Intimo3 (outlet + 2nd quality) - Dark Pink. All colors confirmed scannable via RF scanners and tablets. All other order info (FLASH, BRAZIL, EVENTS) must use a separate small additional sticker.

title: Delete Current Assignment of HU When COPAWA Doesn't Work
content: Use transaction ZAP_UPDATE_VPOBJ. The HU must be in X (HU managed storage location) before executing. Enter the HU number, remove the Test tick, and execute. The current assignment will be deleted once you execute the VPOBJ transaction. Transaction: ZAP_UPDATE_VPOBJ, COPAWA.

title: Sales Order Segmentation Issue
content: If materials are not picked into the OBD, the segment must be updated in the sales order. Go to VA02, find the sales order, and update the segment field. Without the correct segment, materials will not be included in the outbound delivery. Transaction: VA02.

title: VLMOVE - 2 Step Location Transfer
content: Steps for 2-step location transfer in VLMOVE: 1) Go to VLMOVE. 2) Select 0012 from the Process dropdown and enter the HU. 3) Go to Material tab, enter material and plant. 4) Check batches in both batch columns. 5) Click Post Goods Movement. A material document is created and the HU shows in stock. Transaction: VLMOVE.

title: Goods Issue to Cost Center
content: Steps for GI to cost center using HUMO: 1) Go to HUMO, paste the HU/HUs and execute. 2) Select HU line, go to Edit > Change HU Posting > Other Posting. 3) In Process Dropdown, select 0013 - Use for cost center from Warehouse. 4) Enter the cost center. Key cost centers: 811C111 CUTTING, 811C122 SEWING FLOOR, 811C313 PRODUCTION PLANNING, 811C322 PURCHASING, 811C331 QUALITY RM, 811C342 TRAINING CENTRE, 811C622 SAMPLE ROOM, 811C299 SUBCONTRACTING MGMT. Transaction: HUMO.

title: Confirmation Mismatch in Bra Cup Operation
content: Error occurs due to unprocessed IDOCs between the active system and SAP. IDOC repository path: \\10.241.9.152\SAP_Interface\. Inbound IDOCs stored in 'tx' folder, outbound in 'rx' folder. Confirmed IDOCs moved to Archive folder. Resolution: Go to BD87, select the partner system, set Changed On date to match IDoc creation date. Execute and click Process to reprocess unprocessed IDOCs. Double-click 'Application document not posted' to see error details. Transaction: BD87, WE02.

title: Production Order Issued Component Reversal
content: Three options for GI reversal: 1) RFQ list - After GI run LM01, go to menu path 5,1,5, give the HU and reverse GI. 2) ZFPP_MB11 - Used by production team. Requires: Material code, Production order, Packaging material (e.g. Box_Sirio), returning supply area. 3) MIGO - Select Trans/Event A07 Goods Issue, Reference R10 Other, Movement type 262. Enter Material, Qty, Batch, and Production order in Account Assignment tab. This creates an inbound document; process PGR to GR the quantity. Production order confirmation reverse: Go to CO13, enter production order, select confirmation to reverse and save. Transaction: LM01, ZFPP_MB11, MIGO, CO13.

title: Remove Segmentation from MD04 (Two Stock Lines)
content: Issue: Segment activated stock for customer plants of bra cups causes two stock lines in MD04. Resolution: Go to SU01, add the following parameter with value X (parameter name visible in SU01 Parameters tab). This removes the segmentation display. Transaction: SU01, MD04.

title: Unable to Create TO from TR
content: Cause: There is a 0 quantity line in the BOM from the related SKU. Resolution: 1) Find the BOM for the material. 2) Add a new line with the required quantity. 3) After updating BOM, create the TO again. Reference ticket: 2023-2111859. Transaction: CS02, LT0A.

title: Resolve GI Not Posted for HU Error
content: Identify exact error using COPAWA/COWBHUWA to assign and issue HU manually. Reason 01: Inspection plan assigned to HU is in REL status instead of UD. Reason 02: Production order component has a 0 quantity line attached to batch — two lines appear (one with qty/no batch, one with batch/no qty). Solution for Reason 02: Insert a new line in production order with the correct requirement quantity and delete the two incorrect lines. Then execute WM Material Staging. Also check HUs assigned to a production order using ZAP_UPDATE_VPOBJ (HU storage location must be X). Then GI the component via LM01 or COPAWA/COWBHUWA. Transaction: COPAWA, COWBHUWA, LM01, ZAP_UPDATE_VPOBJ, CO02.

title: Resolving No Open Reservation Found Issue
content: Resolution: 1) Check production order WM staging simulation in CO02. 2) Find the material with error and verify if control cycle columns are filled or blank. 3) If blank, create control cycle data using LPK1 - fill required fields and save. Identify the supply area from the WM Staging supply area column. 4) Run WM Staging and save. Transaction: CO02, LPK1.

title: Correct MD04 Stock Splitting for Bra Cup Planning Team
content: Go to SU01, enter User ID and go to Change mode. Then go to Parameters tab and add ZMD04HANAOFF parameter with value X. Save. This corrects the stock splitting display in MD04 for bra cup planning. Transaction: SU01.

title: Correct Way to Update CMT Sales Order with Production Order and Purchase Order
content: Update the correct fields in the CMT sales order to link the purchase order and production order. If not updated correctly, the system will give an error. Verify the specific field mapping from the CMT order screen — update both PO and PRO references in the designated fields. Transaction: VA02.

title: Job Order Printer Setup (SU01)
content: Go to SU01 with the User ID. Go to the Defaults tab and set the default printer in the Output Device field. This configures which printer the user's job orders will print to. Reference ticket: 2023-2120029. Transaction: SU01.

title: Production Order Header GR Quantity Correction
content: Transaction ZPCON_076F runs automatically daily to check GR quantity discrepancies. Setup input: run daily. The transaction checks every order and generates a spool only for orders with different quantities. To review: Open spool in Excel, filter including 'order' to get the list of orders with problems. The last line of the spool shows the count of orders in error. Run again in update mode with the list of orders. Run in background. Note: Orders created in August are migration issues — do not report. Orders created after August should be raised to SAP support with linked tickets. Transaction: ZPCON_076F, SP01.

title: Change the Class of Batch
content: Steps to change batch classification: 1) Check in BMBC if batches exist — if yes, go to Classification tab for each batch and delete it. 2) Go to CL20N and delete the existing wrong classification. 3) Add new row with correct batch classification (e.g. RM_BATCH). 4) Go to BMBC and for every batch create the new batch classification using the paper button. Transaction: BMBC, CL20N.

title: MRP Area Assign for Material
content: Use transaction ZFPP_MM_MRPAREA to assign MRP areas to materials. This is the custom transaction for SAP integration requirements. Transaction: ZFPP_MM_MRPAREA.

title: After Issued Quantity Reversal Using ZFPP_MB11 - How to Add New Line
content: After reversing issued quantity in ZFPP_MB11, there may be no open quantity line for remaining stock. Steps: 1) Identify the unbalanced line (e.g. line 0010). 2) Add a new line item (e.g. line number 0001) for the balance quantity. 3) Close the unbalanced line with the same quantity to zero it out. Example: Requirement 48.070, reversed 22 MTR — add new line for balance 22 MTR and close the unbalanced line. Transaction: ZFPP_MB11, CO02.

title: Batch Management Enable for Material
content: If enabling batch management gives 'stock exists' error even with no stock: Check whether there are any open reservations or open production order lines. Close them by adding the Final Issue tick to each open line. Then retry enabling batch management. Transaction: MM02, MMAM, CO02.

title: MRP Area Map for Suppliers
content: Use transaction ZFPP_VENDOR_MRPA to map MRP areas for suppliers: 1) Open a new entry. 2) MRP Area - enter the plant and vendor code and vendor name. 3) Double-click the item to complete details. Transaction: ZFPP_VENDOR_MRPA.

title: Unnecessary PLO Generation for COBJ Articles
content: Steps to investigate unnecessary PLO: 1) Check material is properly extended for relevant MRP area (e.g. PPC1-LO). 2) Check MRP type — it should be PD. 3) Check stock requirement with MD04 to understand actual status. Common root cause: required article has stock segment BJ but available stock has no stock segment — mismatch causes PLO. Reference ticket: 2025-2014970. Transaction: MD04, MM03.

title: View Movements for a Single Material
content: MB51 - Best report to see all material movements for one material. How to use: Enter Material number, Plant, Date range, Execute. Shows: GR (101), Quality inspection stock (103/105), Scrap (551), Consumption (261, 201), Transfer postings (311), Movement type, User who posted, Document number. MB52 - Current stock only (Unrestricted, Quality, Blocked, Special stock). MMBE - Stock type and storage location level check. COOIS - For production consumption (261 movement) — shows which production order consumed material. Common movement types: 101 GR, 103 GR to Quality, 105 Release from Quality, 261 Production consumption, 551 Scrap, 201 Cost center consumption. Transaction: MB51, MB52, MMBE, COOIS.

title: Resolve Rules Doesn't Allow Listing Through WSM3
content: Steps: 1) Go to WSOA2. 2) Enter plant code. 3) Go to Material Group tab and enter the material group of the material that doesn't allow listing. 4) Save. Then go to WSM3 and list the material successfully. Transaction: WSOA2, WSM3.

title: Add Additional Language for Material Group
content: Information only — do not update in PRD system. Steps: 1) Go to WG22 and enter the material group to update. 2) Go to Goto Tab > Additional Languages. 3) Insert new row, add required material group language and description. 4) Save. Transaction: WG22.

title: Create PR - New Flow
content: ZA4A PR type requires no approval. Steps: 1) Go to MB51N and select document type. Fill: PR Type - ZA4A, Acct Assignment Category - K (Cost center), Material number, Quantity, Purchasing group - 135 (Omega-IT), Cost center (get from Finance). 2) Go to ME5A, enter fields, and view the report. 3) Double-click on the line to go to the PR. Transaction: MB51N, ME5A.

title: Change Material Type with MMAM
content: Before proceeding with MMAM to change material type: Ensure there are no stocks, no open purchase orders, and no open documents for the material. All must be cleared before the material type change can proceed. Transaction: MMAM, MM03.

title: TO Creation Fail for IBD / Pettaway Fail
content: Root cause: Wrong Delivery Address inside the PO line item. Steps: 1) Correct Delivery Address inside PO line item. 2) Extract supplier invoice number from IBD. 3) Delete relevant IBD. 4) Identify IDoc from /n/aif/err. 5) Go to WE19 and reprocess the IDoc to create a new IBD. Transaction: ME22N, /n/aif/err, WE19.

title: XR2 System Configuration
content: Enter Service file record: sapmsXR2 3601/TCP. Description: SAP S/4HANA ERP (XR2). Message Server: sapXR2.calzedonia.com. System ID: XR2. Configure SAP GUI with these connection parameters for XR2 system access.

title: Printer Configuration for HU Labels
content: Steps: 1) Go to NACE transaction, select V6 - Handling Units, click Condition Records. 2) Double-click and select output type ZZ02 - HU LK Finished Goods. Select ZPH1 for Raw Materials. 3) Select PkgMtlType/User combination. 4) Provide packaging material type ZBFG and User ID, execute. 5) Go to Output Condition and select Create. 6) Fill fields, click Communication button. 7) Provide Output Device, mark Print Immediately checkbox, Save. Use SPAD to view and manage printer spools and settings. Transaction: NACE, SPAD.

title: Get User Data from SAP
content: Use SUIM transaction to extract all user data from SAP. SUIM provides comprehensive user information including roles, authorizations, and logon data. Transaction: SUIM.

title: Check SAP Printer
content: Use T-code SPAD to check and manage SAP printers. SPAD shows printer device settings, spool status, and output configuration. Transaction: SPAD.

title: Extract Confirmation XML - STO Confirmation
content: URL: http://sde-spo1j01.csg1.sys.calzedonia.com:52200/dir/start/index.jsp. Steps: 1) Go to Configuration and Monitoring. 2) Click Adapter Engine. 3) Click Message Monitor. 4) Select the date and press filter. 5) Select correct flow from the list and press 3. 6) Select message — open or export. 7) Open message and select Payload — better to Download as XML file. To find the IDoc: Copy the Message ID from message details, go to TCode ZISR_ECOMMERCE_ORD, paste Message ID in EDI Archive Key field. Transaction: ZISR_ECOMMERCE_ORD.

title: Printer Output Control
content: To assign printer type for a user: Go to NACE, select the application, and go to Condition Record. View and change printer assignment for user by selecting the PkgMtlType/User combination and updating the output device. Transaction: NACE.

title: ZEBRA ZQ521 ZPL Configuration
content: ZPL configuration commands for ZEBRA ZQ521 printer: ! U1 setvar "device.languages" "zpl" | ! U1 setvar "device.pnp_option" "zpl" | ! U1 do "device.reset" "". Send these commands to the printer to set ZPL as the device language.

title: GL Account Block for Posting
content: To fix GL account block for posting: Go to FS00, find the GL account, and untick the posting block indicator. Important: Take confirmation from Finance team before proceeding with this change. Reference ticket: 2023-2114384. Transaction: FS00.

title: Component in CK11N Showing as Automatic Cost Estimate Instead of Raw Material
content: When costing run for FG material shows component as 'Automatic Cost Estimate' instead of 'Raw Material', there are three main causes: 1) Material master data not maintained properly. 2) Source list not updated for material. 3) Material inserted as BOM component before master data update, causing a cost estimation to be created. Resolution: 1) Verify and correct material master data. 2) Maintain source list correctly. 3) Delete any existing cost estimates for the component using CK13N/CK74N. Transaction: CK11N, CK13N, MM02, CS02.

title: Invoice Layout Error - Preferential Country of Origin / Commodity Code
content: If an invoice is not creating the preferred layout, check whether the required field is updated in customer master data. The missing field in the customer master determines the invoice layout selection. Verify commodity code and preferential country of origin fields. Transaction: XD02/VD02.

title: ASN Document Not Submitting to IUNGO - Delivery Address Error
content: Error: Vendor receives error saying delivery addresses are different. Cause: Vendor has included POs with different storage locations in the same XML document. Fix: XML document should only contain POs with the same destination storage location. Keep separate XML per storage location. Also check table ZISR_RHULIFNR for packing BOX and storage type indicator — if blank, it is a material master data issue. Verify both stock removal and stock placement fields are updated for the particular warehouse.

title: Iungo Email Addresses - Test and Live
content: Iungo TEST email addresses: PPA1/PPA2 Omega Line Ltd (OMEGALINENENEW) - omegaline@test.iungomail.com. PPB1 Alpha Apparels Ltd (ALPHAAPPARELSNEW) - alphaapparels@test.iungomail.com. PPD1 Sirio Ltd (SIRI0NEW) - sirio@test.iungomail.com. PPC1 Benji Ltd (BENJINEW) - benji@test.iungomail.com. Iungo LIVE email addresses: PPA1/PPA2 Omega Line Ltd - omegaline@iungomail.com. PPB1 Alpha Apparels - alphaapparels@iungomail.com. PPD1 Sirio - sirio@iungomail.com. PPC1 Benji - benji@iungomail.com.

title: Iungo Test Cycle Process
content: IDoc Message Type: ZPP_XIF_IUG_ASN_SAVE (Iungo to SAP). Steps: 1) Create a PO and add message type ZPIU, execute through ME9F. 2) Log into Iungo test: https://webapps.calzedonia.com:13443/iungo. 3) Verify PO is available in Iungo. Rules: Supplier submits 1 Packing List per Invoice, always 1-to-1 relation. XML encoding must be UTF-8-BOM. Email subject format: 'Packing List XXX of dd-mm-yyyy - Supplier Code'. File name format: PL_XXX_[Supplier Code].xml. Date format in XML: dd-mm-yyyy. Contact codes: Z2 Madawa - 9500004836, Z1 Madawa - 9500004837. Transaction: ME9F.

title: Maintain Table ZISR_RHULIFNR
content: Steps: 1) Create new packing material using MM01 with material type VERP. 2) Go to VHAR and create a packaging material type, or use SM30 to edit table V_TVTY. 3) Go to SM30 and update ZISR_RHULIFNR filling required data. Transaction: MM01, VHAR, SM30.

title: EWM Standard T-Codes Reference
content: Master Data: /SCWM/MAT1 Maintain Product, /SCWM/LOC Maintain Storage Bins, /SCWM/LOCMON Bin Monitor, /SCWM/PKG Packaging Specs, /SCWM/TU Transport Unit, /SCWM/GRDEST GR Destination. Inbound: /SCWM/PRDI Inbound Delivery, /SCWM/GR Goods Receipt, /SCWM/GRPE GR by Exception, /SCWM/RFUI RF Menu. Outbound: /SCWM/PRDO Outbound Delivery, /SCWM/PICK Picking Monitor, /SCWM/POST Goods Issue, /SCWM/WAVE Create/Release Waves. Warehouse Tasks: /SCWM/TO_CONF Confirm WT, /SCWM/TO_MON WT Monitor, /SCWM/WO Warehouse Order. Physical Inventory: /SCWM/PI, /SCWM/PI_UI, /SCWM/COUNT. HU/Packing: /SCWM/HUMON HU Monitor, /SCWM/HUPAST Pack Station, /SCWM/ADHU Adjust HU. Monitoring: /SCWM/MON Main Monitor, /SCWM/QUEUES Queue Monitor, /SCWM/RSRC Resource Monitor. RF: /SCWM/RFUI RF Menu. Exception: /SCWM/EXCEPT Exception Codes, /SCWM/EXC_MON Exception Monitor.

title: EWM Physical Inventory Process
content: Standard PI transactions: /SCWM/PI, /SCWM/PI_UI, /SCWM/PI_PROCESS, /SCWM/COUNT. Our process transactions: /SCWM/PI_CREATE, /SCWM/PI_DOC_CREATE, Physical Inventory Fiori App, ZEWM_LK_PI_REPORT, ZFEWM_PHY_INV_COUNT, /SCWM/PI_PROCESS, /SCWM/DIFF_ANALYZER. Header data maintenance: ZFEWM_PHINV_HQ (HQ), ZFEWM_PHINV_IQ (IQ). Counted qty apps: ZFEWM_PHINV_Hq, ZFEWM_PHINV_Iq. Reference: UAT_EWM_22 Physical Inventory.xlsx.

title: HS Code Update for OBD Items
content: Use transaction ZISR_MPD_UPD: In Selection Criteria tab: 1) Fill with ERP delivery number. 2) Enter the material code with missing HS code. 3) Remove Test checkbox. In Information to Update tab: Mark the Duty Code checkbox, fill the value to update, and execute. Transaction: ZISR_MPD_UPD.

title: EWM Queue Error: Warehouse Request for Delivery Exists
content: Error: 'Warehouse request for SAP EWM delivery XXXXXXXX exists'. Cause: ZB18 output type resets distribution status of already-distributed inbound delivery. The delivery is automatically created when Shipper Plant posts GI and ZB01 is processed. ZB18 runs changes and resets distribution status, triggering re-distribution which causes the error. Solution: Go to SMQ2 and Delete the Queue. Note: There is a pending CR to fix this issue in XR2 that needs to be tested.

title: EWM Queue Error: Can Only Post to BIN.REV.CNSMP Using HU
content: Error: 'You can only post to bin BIN.REV.CNSMP using a handling unit'. Cause: ZMM_MIGO_MASS generates an inbound delivery for reverse consumption, but the user missed the packing step before distribution. Process should be: change qty if needed > PACK > Distribute manually. When packing is skipped and delivery is distributed, system tries to post GR without HU. Solution: Go to /SCWM/PRDI and pack the stock in a HU, then execute the queue. Transaction: /SCWM/PRDI, SMQ2.

title: EWM Queue Error: Handling Unit Posted for GR Without Stock
content: Error: 'There is already a Handling Unit # posted for GR without stock'. Solution: Run SE38 with program ZEWM_HU_ERP_UPDATE using the specified variant. Transaction: SE38 (ZEWM_HU_ERP_UPDATE).

title: EWM Queue Error: Delivery Has Not Yet Been Put Away
content: Error: 'Delivery has not yet been put away'. Cause: IBDs created before Go-Live have WM status retained. When distributed and GR posted, system tries to manage WM Status even though it should be EWM. Solution: Apply SAP Note 3404401 steps. The system generates a new queue for the same IBD with suffix DLV* — this new queue needs to be only Saved in SMQ3. Reference note: 3404401 - SMQ2 Error 'VL609 - Delivery has not yet been put away/picked'. Transaction: SMQ2, SMQ3.

title: Q Issues - Volume and Excess Volume Tolerance Missing
content: Cause: Volume and excess volume tolerance is missing under Sales General Plant Data tab in MM02. Resolution: Go to MM02, navigate to Sales General Plant Data tab, and fill in the volume and excess volume tolerance fields. Save. Transaction: MM02.

title: No Posting-Relevant Material Items Could Be Found
content: Error: 'No posting-relevant material items could be found'. Resolution: Go to HUDIFF transaction to identify and resolve the discrepancy. Transaction: HUDIFF.
